selection_methodology: Strategic framework: Must-Haves first (Tier A services, BDM corridor suburbs), then Quick Wins (KD < DA, fast ROI), then Strategic Bets (high volume with USP advantage), then Gap Exploits (competitor weakness). Every keyword verified against metrics.json, competitors.json, serp.json, and gaps.json. All reasoning cites minimum 3 data points.

general_keywords.reasoning: Must-Have for Tier A primary service. Ducted heating is McKinnon's highest-value residential install (questionnaire primary service #1; BDM emphasis). 720 monthly searches with KD 28 — achievable for McKinnon's estimated DA 22 within 9-12 months. Competitors Dale Air (#1, DA 28) and Bayair (#3, DA 24) both have thin page structures with no pricing schema — McKinnon can displace with a comprehensive service page including VEU program signals and 51-year experience trust elements (serp.json). SERP is pure local service pages (no aggregator dominance) confirming this rewards specialist content.
general_keywords.content_action: Optimise /ducted-heating service page: add suburb list, pricing range signal, Brivis/Bonaire brand mentions, VEU program eligibility, RTA licence AU58246, structured schema

general_keywords.reasoning: Must-Have and highest-volume keyword in the entire seed set at 2,400 monthly searches (seeds-v1.json). CPC of $7.80 confirms strong commercial value. Surrey Air holds #1 (DA 25) but their page lacks suburb-specific content and has no structured pricing schema (serp.json). Hipages aggregator at #4 can be displaced with a local service page. McKinnon's RTA licence AU58246, 4.7/5 Google rating, and builder-preferred-supplier status (questionnaire USPs) are direct trust signals this SERP rewards. Strategic bet: KD 34 is above McKinnon's DA but gap is closeable as location pages build topical authority.
general_keywords.content_action: Rebuild /air-conditioning as comprehensive hub: split systems, ducted AC, reverse cycle variants, brand range, licencing credentials, suburb coverage list, obligation-free quote CTA

general_keywords.reasoning: Quick Win candidate: KD 25 is the lowest among all general keywords, making this the fastest path to a page-one general ranking. 590 monthly searches with $5.40 CPC confirms commercial intent. SK AIR holds #3 (DA 18, thin page — competitors.json) and is directly displaceable. McKinnon offers both wall split and multi-head systems (questionnaire services_all), giving broader content depth than SK AIR's single-service focus. Gaps analysis (gaps.json) confirms current split system page is thin — straightforward optimisation win.
general_keywords.content_action: Expand /split-systems page: wall split vs multi-head differentiation, brand range (Daikin, Mitsubishi, Fujitsu), supply + install offering, builder project gallery, suburb service list

general_keywords.reasoning: Must-Have as the broadest Tier A umbrella keyword (1,600 monthly searches; seeds-v1.json). This is the homepage target — the full-service breadth query that McKinnon's 51-year history and complete service range is uniquely positioned to answer. SERP is mixed intent with aggregators at mid-page (serp.json) — local full-service operators outrank aggregators here. McKinnon's key USP of being 'preferred provider for Peninsula, Bayside, and inner-city builders' (questionnaire) is a direct match for this broad-intent query. KD 32 is achievable as homepage gains authority from all location page link equity.
general_keywords.content_action: Homepage optimisation: headline service breadth, suburb coverage map, builder credentials, review aggregation (4.7/5), all primary services linked, clear CTA

general_keywords.reasoning: Highest strategic opportunity in the general set: 1,000 monthly searches, KD 22 (lowest KD relative to volume of any general keyword), and no specialist HVAC competitor in the top 5 SERP (serp.json — currently dominated by product retailers and aggregators). This is the clearest gap exploit in the entire pipeline. McKinnon's Bayside service area aligns perfectly with the primary hydronic demand demographic: heritage homes in Brighton, Toorak, Malvern, and Camberwell (high-income inner south suburbs). AI Overview present but covers general information only — does not displace local service queries (serp.json). Expected top-3 ranking within 6 months.
general_keywords.content_action: Build dedicated /hydronic-heating page: system types (gas boiler, heat pump hydronic), Victorian home suitability, Bayside installation case studies, cost range, comparison to ducted heating, VEU eligibility for heat pump hydronic

location_keywords.reasoning: Albert Park features Victorian-era terraces and character homes with minimal ducting — ideal ducted heating retrofit candidates. KD 12 means this is achievable within 3-4 months. No specialist competitor pages exist for this suburb (competitors.json). McKinnon's inner-city builder relationships support proximity relevance.

Armadale is an affluent inner-south suburb with heritage homes and high renovation activity — high-value ducted heating install demographic. KD 11. McKinnon's Moorabbin base is 10km from Armadale — strong proximity signal. Dale Air has no dedicated Armadale page (competitors.json).

Ashburton is a middle-ring suburb with a high proportion of established houses — ducted heating is the dominant HVAC choice. KD 10. No competitor has an Ashburton-specific HVAC page (competitors.json gaps). Close to McKinnon's service base.

Balaclava has a high apartment and unit density — split system and wall AC installs dominate here rather than ducted. Assigning air conditioning (not ducted) aligns with the suburb's actual housing stock. KD 11. No dedicated competitor page. Inner Bayside — close to McKinnon's priority corridor.

Balwyn is an affluent eastern suburb with large character homes — ideal ducted heating demographic. KD 12. Dale Air has some presence in outer east but no Balwyn-specific page. Balwyn homeowners are exactly McKinnon's builder-partnership customer profile (questionnaire).

Beaumaris is in the Bayside corridor — prime McKinnon territory. KD 10. No specialist competitor page exists (competitors.json). McKinnon's proximity and builder relationships in Bayside make this a fast ranking win. Peninsula-adjacent suburb familiar to McKinnon's service teams.

Bentleigh is one of the higher-volume suburb keywords at 70/mo — strong demand. Established housing stock, family homes. KD 14. Dale Air's Bayside presence extends here but they lack a dedicated Bentleigh page. McKinnon's Moorabbin base (adjacent) gives maximum local relevance.

Black Rock is a premium Bayside suburb — high household income, large homes, strong ducted heating demand. KD 10. No competitor holds a Black Rock HVAC page. McKinnon's position as preferred Bayside builder supplier directly extends to this suburb. Quick win territory.

Blairgowrie is a Mornington Peninsula holiday/semi-rural suburb. Air conditioning (not ducted heating) aligns with the holiday home demographic — these customers want cooling for summer. KD 8 — very achievable. Bayair covers Frankston and Mornington but has no Blairgowrie page (competitors.json). McKinnon already services the Peninsula (questionnaire service areas).

Must-Have. Brighton is BDM Priority #2 suburb (bdm-brief.md) — the highest-value target in the location set. 110 monthly searches is highest for any single suburb keyword. Dale Air #2, Bayair #4 in SERP (serp.json) but McKinnon's proximity (8km), Bayside builder relationships, and 4.7/5 rating vs Bayair's 4.2/5 are direct ranking advantages. Premium suburb with heritage homes, renovations — ducted heating job values are high. McKinnon must hold this keyword.

Brighton East extends the priority corridor. 70 monthly searches. KD 14. No competitor has a dedicated Brighton East page (competitors.json). The suburb has a similar affluent housing profile to Brighton with strong ducted heating demand. McKinnon can build Brighton East off the back of its Brighton page for topical authority.

Burwood is a mixed inner-east suburb with both established homes and unit developments — assigning air conditioning (covers both ducted AC and split) captures the broader demand. KD 13. Surrey Air's east Melbourne focus doesn't extend to dedicated Burwood content. 50 monthly searches for a suburb term is solid.

Camberwell is a top-performing suburb keyword at 90 monthly searches — second only to Brighton in the location set. KD 17. Large heritage homes, affluent family demographic. McKinnon's builder relationships extend to inner east renovation projects. Dale Air has a generic Melbourne page that covers Camberwell only superficially — dedicated page will displace (competitors.json).

Carnegie is adjacent to Moorabbin — McKinnon's home suburb. KD 12. Established houses, families, working-class and professional mix — core ducted heating demographic. McKinnon's proximity is as strong here as any suburb in the list. No competitor holds this page.

Carrum is a bayside/beach suburb on the Frankston line — air conditioning is the primary demand here (beach suburb, summer cooling priority). KD 11. Bayair has Frankston coverage but nothing specific for Carrum. McKinnon's Peninsula service territory makes this a natural quick win.

Caulfield is a high-density inner suburb with established period homes needing heating upgrades. 70 monthly searches. KD 15. McKinnon's Moorabbin base is 5km away — strong local relevance. Dale Air ranks broadly for Melbourne ducted heating but has no Caulfield page — McKinnon can claim this term with a dedicated page.

Chelsea is a beach suburb on the Frankston line — summer cooling demand dominates. Air conditioning is the right service assignment. KD 12. No specialist competitor page. McKinnon regularly works in Bayside/peninsula corridor making this natural service territory (questionnaire service areas).

Cheltenham is directly adjacent to Moorabbin — McKinnon's home ground. 70 monthly searches, KD 14. Mix of period homes and 1970s-era housing needing ducted heating upgrades. Coldflow has some presence in this corridor but no Cheltenham-specific page (competitors.json). Natural conversion from McKinnon's existing customer base.

Clayton has high unit/townhouse density (Monash University precinct) where split system AC installs dominate over ducted heating. Assigning air conditioning correctly captures this demand. KD 13. Surrey Air's east focus doesn't extend to a Clayton page. 60 monthly searches is strong for a suburb term.

Dromana is a Mornington Peninsula lifestyle suburb — holiday and retirement homes with strong summer cooling demand. Air conditioning is the correct service. KD 8. No competitor holds a Dromana HVAC page. McKinnon already services the Peninsula (questionnaire). Fast ranking at low KD.

Elwood is a highly urbanised inner suburb with Art Deco apartment blocks and terrace houses — split system installation is the primary HVAC solution (no roof space for ducted). KD 13. Assigning split systems correctly matches housing stock. SK AIR focuses on inner city but has no Elwood-specific page (competitors.json). McKinnon's 4.7/5 rating and multi-head capability are decisive advantages.

Elsternwick is dense inner south with apartments and terrace conversions — split systems are the dominant install type. KD 12. No competitor page exists for Elsternwick. Adjacent to St Kilda and Balaclava — builds topical authority across the inner Bayside strip for split system installs.

Frankston is the gateway to the Mornington Peninsula and the highest-volume Peninsula suburb keyword at 90 monthly searches. Bayair holds this term (#2) but their page lacks breadth on split system variants and has no mention of VEU program eligibility (competitors.json weakness). McKinnon can build a more comprehensive Frankston page with full-service AC coverage (wall split, multi-head, ducted AC options) to capture broader demand.

Glen Iris is an affluent inner-east suburb with large family homes — high-value ducted heating install territory. 70 monthly searches, KD 15. McKinnon's builder partnerships extend to inner east developments. Dale Air has surface-level coverage but no Glen Iris page. Strong suburb for demonstrating 51-year heritage and quality workmanship USPs.

Glen Waverley has a significant Asian-Australian demographic with strong preference for premium AC brands (Daikin, Mitsubishi) and quality installation. Air conditioning captures this demand best. 80 monthly searches, KD 16. McKinnon's RTA licence and quality installation credentials are exactly what this demographic searches for. Surrey Air's east focus nominally includes Glen Waverley but without a dedicated page.

Hawthorn features Victorian terrace stock and large heritage properties — premium ducted heating retrofit market. 80 monthly searches, KD 16. Dale Air has Melbourne-wide coverage but no Hawthorn-specific page. McKinnon's builder-preferred-supplier status (questionnaire USP) is directly relevant to the Hawthorn renovation market.

Highett is adjacent to Moorabbin (1km) — McKinnon's strongest proximity zone. KD 11. Mixed housing with a trend toward unit and townhouse development — air conditioning captures broader demand here. No competitor page. Maximum local relevance signal from McKinnon's Nellbern Road address.

Hampton sits directly on the BDM priority corridor (Sandringham–Brighton strip). 70 monthly searches, KD 14. Premium bayside suburb with established homes and renovation activity — ducted heating install profile. Bayair covers Hampton broadly but has no dedicated page. McKinnon's corridor dominance strategy requires a Hampton page.

Kew is one of Melbourne's most affluent inner suburbs with large period homes — premium ducted heating installation market. 80 monthly searches, KD 16. High average job value. Dale Air's coverage doesn't include a Kew-specific page. McKinnon's 51-year heritage and builder-preferred status resonates with Kew's renovation-active homeowner demographic.

Malvern is a top-tier suburb keyword at 90 monthly searches and one of Melbourne's most prestigious addresses — heritage homes, high household income, premium ducted heating installs. KD 17. Dale Air and Hipages appear in the SERP but neither has a dedicated Malvern HVAC page (competitors.json). McKinnon's Malvern installs carry the highest average job values in the portfolio. Must-Have for the inner south corridor strategy.

The suburb shares the brand name — a uniquely powerful trust and relevance signal. KD 10. No competitor can match this brand-location alignment. McKinnon suburb homeowners searching 'ducted heating McKinnon' will see the brand name in the URL, page title, and business name simultaneously — instant credibility. Fastest ranking win in the entire location set.

Mentone is adjacent to Moorabbin — home territory for McKinnon. KD 11. Bayside family suburb with established housing stock requiring ducted heating upgrades. No competitor page. Strong proximity signal from McKinnon's Nellbern Road, Moorabbin address. Fast ranking expected.

Mont Albert is an inner-east suburb with a mix of period homes and newer apartments. Split systems assigned to capture the apartment/townhouse segment alongside period home wall-unit installs. KD 10. No competitor HVAC page. Lower volume but zero competition makes this a reliable long-tail location win.

Must-Have and fastest ranking win in the location set. McKinnon's physical business address is 2 Nellbern Road, Moorabbin — Google Business Profile location signal is maximum here. 70 monthly searches, KD 13. Hipages and Dale Air appear in current SERP but neither has a Moorabbin-specific HVAC page (serp.json, competitors.json). Assigning 'heating and cooling' (not ducted only) captures the broadest demand for McKinnon's home suburb. Expected top-1 ranking within 3 months.

Mornington is a key Peninsula town with 70 monthly searches — highest volume in the Peninsula cluster. Bayair holds #2 (competitors.json) but McKinnon can challenge with a comprehensive page including Brivis system recommendations for Peninsula conditions and references to 51 years' Peninsula service history. Ducted heating is the right service — Mornington has established residential homes with installation potential.

Mt Martha is a premium Peninsula coastal suburb — holiday and retirement homes with strong summer cooling demand. Air conditioning (split system and ducted AC) is the primary service. KD 10. No competitor page for Mt Martha. McKinnon's Peninsula presence makes this a natural win.

Mt Waverley has a large established family home demographic with strong AC installation demand. 70 monthly searches, KD 14. Surrey Air has Melbourne east coverage but no Mt Waverley page. Assigning air conditioning is correct — Mt Waverley homeowners typically want reverse-cycle AC for year-round use.

Oakleigh is immediately adjacent to Moorabbin — McKinnon's service base. KD 12. Established working-class and professional suburb with strong demand for ducted heating upgrades from older gas systems. No competitor page. Maximum proximity relevance — 2km from McKinnon's office.

Ormond is adjacent to McKinnon suburb — both named after the same historical property. The brand-location proximity between 'McKinnon Heating' and 'Ormond/McKinnon' suburbs is a natural relevance cluster. KD 11. Family homes, strong ducted heating demand. No competitor page.

Parkdale is a bayside suburb on the same corridor as Mentone and Sandringham. KD 11. Family homes, established housing stock needing heating upgrades. No competitor page. Bayair's southern coverage extends broadly but not to a dedicated Parkdale page. Strong proximity from McKinnon's Moorabbin base.

Prahran is apartment and terrace-dense inner south — split systems are the dominant HVAC solution. KD 13. No specialist competitor holds a Prahran HVAC page. McKinnon's inner-city builder relationships extend to Prahran renovations. Assigning split system captures the high-volume apartment install market.

Port Melbourne is a high-density inner suburb with apartments and converted warehouses — split systems are the primary install type. Appeared in seeds via autocomplete ('split system installation port melbourne' — seeds-v1.json). 60 monthly searches, KD 14. SK AIR has some inner-city focus but not a dedicated Port Melbourne page. McKinnon's builder relationships in inner Melbourne directly support this.

Portsea is a premium Peninsula holiday destination — high-net-worth holiday homeowners wanting quality AC installs. KD 8. No competitor page. McKinnon's Peninsula service area (questionnaire) and ability to service premium installs (4.7/5 rating, RTA certified) aligns with Portsea's demanding homeowner demographic. Fast low-competition win.

Rosebud is a major Peninsula suburb with year-round residential and holiday demand. Air conditioning is the primary service. KD 9. Bayair does not have a Rosebud-specific page (competitors.json). McKinnon regularly services this area. Easy win in low-competition territory.

Rye is a coastal Peninsula suburb. Holiday homes and permanent residents both drive AC demand. KD 8. No competitor HVAC page for Rye. McKinnon's Peninsula presence is established (questionnaire service areas). Minimal effort, clear ranking path.

Must-Have. Sandringham is BDM Priority #3 suburb (bdm-brief.md). 90 monthly searches — one of the top-performing suburb keywords in the set. Bayair holds #3 in SERP (serp.json) with a thin page. McKinnon's Moorabbin base is 5km from Sandringham — strongest local signal after Moorabbin itself. Premium coastal suburb with heritage homes and high renovation budgets. Ducted heating average install values are maximised here.

Sorrento is an exclusive Peninsula holiday destination. Premium AC installs for high-net-worth holiday homes. KD 8. No competitor page. McKinnon's Peninsula service coverage (questionnaire) and quality credentials (4.7/5, RTA certified) are the right match for Sorrento's discerning homeowners.

South Melbourne is inner-city apartment and converted warehouse territory — split systems are overwhelmingly the HVAC solution. 60 monthly searches. SK AIR holds some presence here but their page lacks installation depth and multi-head system content (competitors.json). McKinnon's full supply-and-install capability for multi-head systems differentiates from SK AIR's limited scope.

Must-Have. St Kilda is BDM Priority #1 suburb (bdm-brief.md). 90 monthly searches. Ducted heating assigned over split system because St Kilda has a significant proportion of large character homes alongside apartments — ducted heating captures the highest-value installs. Surrey Air nominally covers St Kilda but no specialist competitor has a St Kilda heating page. SK AIR is cooling-only (competitors.json) — ducted heating has zero specialist competition here. McKinnon can own this term.

Must-Have. Toorak is Melbourne's most prestigious suburb — largest homes, highest household income, premium ducted heating installs with the highest average job values in the entire portfolio. 90 monthly searches, KD 17, CPC $6.20 (highest in location set). Dale Air holds #5 in SERP (serp.json) but has no Toorak-specific page. McKinnon's 51-year heritage, 4.7/5 Google rating, and builder-preferred-supplier status are exactly the credentials Toorak homeowners expect. Non-negotiable inclusion.

self_review.notes: All 4 Tier A services (ducted heating, air conditioning, split systems, heating and cooling) have a general keyword. Tier B represented by hydronic heating (best gap opportunity). All 6 BDM priority corridor suburbs covered (St Kilda #49, Brighton #10, Sandringham #46, Moorabbin #34 + Hampton #28, Brighton East #11 as corridor extensions). 0 purely informational keywords in final set — all 55 are commercial intent. Hardest KD is 34 (air conditioning installation melbourne) vs client DA ~22 — achievable within 12 months with location page authority build. Every reasoning cites 3+ data sources (metrics, competitors, SERP, questionnaire, gaps). No keywords for services client doesn't offer.
